'''Horn Station''' was a backwater [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Lahara sector/Legends|Lahara sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was neglected by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] until a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], nicknamed "[[Pinky]]," liberated the planet from [[Shoto Eyefire]], a [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] and [[blastfighter]]. Horn Station was the homeworld of a [[Unidentified Horn Station species|species]] of hulking, green-skinned, reptilian [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]].
